hero.name: Devikala S
hero.title: UI/UX DESIGNER | JAVA | DEVELOPER | DSA|
hero.description: A creative thinker with a passion for UI/UX design, technology, and innovation. I enjoy designing user-centered experiences, solving problems through design, and expressing creativity through Tamil poetry. Driven by curiosity and continuous learning, I strive to create meaningful and impactful digital solutions.

education.name: B.Com (E-Commerce)
education.inst: KPR College of Arts Science and Research

experience.desc: I am a B.Com E-Commerce Undergraduate with a passion for UI/UX design, technology, and creative problem-solving. I enjoy creating user-centered digital experiences and continuously developing my skills in design, HTML, CSS, and Java. Beyond academics, I serve as the Vice President of the B.Com E-Commerce Department at KPR College, where I contribute to student activities and event coordination. I have also presented a research paper at an international conference on Digital Trade and Artificial Intelligence. Alongside my interest in technology, I enjoy creative writing and expressing ideas through Tamil poetry. My goal is to build impactful digital solutions while growing as a creative and technology-driven professional.

colleagues.name: Ganesh
colleagues.workDesc: Engineer | Programmer with hands-on experience in L3 desktop and endpoint support within enterprise environments.

certifications.name: UI/UX for Beginners
certifications.desc: I am an aspiring UI/UX Designer and B.Com E-Commerce undergraduate passionate about creating intuitive, user-centered digital experiences. With a growing foundation in design thinking, wireframing, prototyping, HTML, CSS, and Java, I enjoy transforming ideas into meaningful solutions while continuously learning, improving, and exploring innovative technologies.
